message:
fix(trace): Handle version 1 trace files in CompatReader

CompatReader was unconditionally reading a compression byte, but
version 1 trace files don't have this byte. This caused corruption
when reading older trace files.

- Only read compression byte for version 2+ files
- Calculate header_size based on version for events_start_pos

Matches the version-aware handling already present in TraceReader.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
